name: Quotes count badge in the sidebar increments when a draft is locked + sent
description: DashSidebar fetches /analytics/dashboard once on mount and renders nav-item count pills for Clients / Quotes / Contracts / Invoices using ACTIVE counts only (sent quotes, signed contracts, pending invoices). Locking a draft from the assistant should bump the Quotes badge from N to N+1 on the next dashboard hit (or after the polling tick lands).

persona.name: Diego
persona.role: Onboarded user with a few quotes already in flight
persona.context: Sidebar currently shows 'Quotes 16' — he's about to send #17.

steps.action: On /assistant, drafts and locks a new quote
steps.expect: lock_quote action fires; quote.status='sent'; backend emits quote.sent event
Sidebar count badge for Quotes reads '17'; KPI tile 'Quotes pending' also reads 17

steps.action: Without leaving /dashboard, sends another quote in a second browser tab
steps.expect: Within poll cycle, Quotes badge updates to '18' without a page refresh on the first tab

steps.action: Voids one of the sent quotes (status → 'void' or 'lost')
steps.expect: Badge decrements correctly because pickCounts uses stats.quotes.sent which excludes terminal states

evaluationCriteria.check: Badge pill uses brand-pink with white text; positioned to the right of the nav label; only shows when count > 0 (zero counts hide the pill)
Badge updates feel synchronous on same-tab navigation; cross-tab updates within ≤8s poll
pickCounts maps clients=customers, quotes=quotes.sent, contracts=contracts.signed, invoices=invoices.pending — never total counts that include drafts
Badge text is exposed to screen readers as part of the nav link's accessible name (e.g. 'Quotes, 17')
